title: feat: move all tiers to hourly pollen refills
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Pollen by the hour
gist.blurb: We've switched all tiers to an hourly pollen refill system. No more waiting until midnight for your next batch of credits—just a steady, continuous drip of creative juice.
gist.summary: All user tiers now receive their pollen credits via an hourly refill system rather than a single daily drop.
gist.impact: Users will see their pollen balances replenish continuously throughout the day, providing a smoother and more predictable generation experience.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about hourly refills of pollen (credits). Visual symbols: clocks, hourglasses, dripping honey/nectar, pollen grains. Characters: Polly the bee checking a timepiece or managing a steady drip of pollen.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny watchmaker's magnifying glass, adjusting a large, glowing lime green (#ecf874) hourglass filled with sparkling pollen. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
